## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss blog post progress, website updates, and future collaboration plans between GrowthX and Edin's team.](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog post layout and graphics are ready; content finalization and newsletter integration pending](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [Webflow integration page design concepts to be presented tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [GrowthX plans to continue working with Edin's team at full rate after pilot period](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [Potential for expanding design services to GrowthX clients and scaling Edin's team](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)

## Topics

### Blog Post and Website Updates

  - [New blog layout deployed with staging functionality for preview](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)

  - [Newsletter integration pending; likely to be embedded at end of posts](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Jason to confirm ARR figures and select team photo for the post](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)

### Webflow Integration Page

  - [Edin's team to present design concepts tomorrow, focusing on balancing developer and non-technical user needs](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Aim to guide Webflow team towards choosing between a documentation-style page or a hybrid approach](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)

### Client Work and Future Plans

  - [Abnormal Security meeting scheduled for Monday to discuss graphic revisions](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [GrowthX considering offering design services to clients as a separate workstream](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [Potential for Edin's team to scale and become a significant branch of GrowthX's operations](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)

### Team Collaboration and Growth

  - [Discussion on aligning Edin's team's goals with GrowthX's expansion](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [Exploration of how Edin's team fits into GrowthX's structure, including collaboration with Ren (product design) and Daniel's client ops team](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Possibility of Edin's team finding and managing additional talent for backend work](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)

## Next Steps
